name: Relational Database: SQL JOIN Visualization
description: A visualization of SQL JOIN operations between two sets. In relational databases, a **JOIN** clause is used to combine rows from two or more tables, based on a related column between them. This simulation represents two sets $A$ and $B$, showing how different join types filter the resulting intersection based on set theory.
renderingCode: class ScienceSimulation { constructor(container, initialInputs) { this.container = container; this.canvas = document.createElement('canvas'); this.canvas.width = 600; this.canvas.height = 300; this.container.appendChild(this.canvas); this.ctx = this.canvas.getContext('2d'); } getSteps(inputs) { const types = { INNER: 'Intersection of A and B.', LEFT: 'All from A, plus matching from B.', RIGHT: 'All from B, plus matching from A.', FULL: 'All records from both tables.' }; return [ { title: 'Step 1: Set Definition', description: `Two tables with ${inputs.sizeA} and ${inputs.sizeB} records respectively.` }, { title: 'Step 2: Join Logic', description: `Performing a **${inputs.joinType} JOIN**: ${types[inputs.joinType]}` } ]; } render(inputs, stepIndex) { const ctx = this.ctx; ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 600, 300); const centerX = 300, centerY = 150; const radius = 80; const colorA = 'rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.6)'; const colorB = 'rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.6)'; const intersection = 'rgba(168, 85, 247, 0.8)'; ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a'; ctx.fillRect(0, 0, 600, 300); const drawCircle = (x, y, color) => { ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(x, y, radius, 0, Math.PI * 2); ctx.fillStyle = color; ctx.fill(); ctx.strokeStyle = 'white'; ctx.stroke(); }; const type = inputs.joinType; ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'screen'; if (type === 'INNER' || type === 'FULL') drawCircle(centerX - 40, centerY, colorA); if (type === 'LEFT' || type === 'FULL') drawCircle(centerX - 40, centerY, colorA); if (type === 'RIGHT' || type === 'FULL') drawCircle(centerX + 40, centerY, colorB); if (type === 'INNER') drawCircle(centerX + 40, centerY, colorB); ctx.fillStyle = 'white'; ctx.font = '20px sans-serif'; ctx.fillText('Table A', centerX - 100, 50); ctx.fillText('Table B', centerX + 60, 50); } }
